LandingPage.heroSubtitle: Transform how customers interact with menus and orders. Improve efficiency and dining experience with our smart POS and QR menu.
LandingPage.featureQRDesc: Customers simply scan a QR code at their table to view the menu and order without waiting for a waiter.
LandingPage.featureDashboardDesc: Monitor daily sales, top-selling items, and your restaurant's overall performance in real-time.
LandingPage.featurePOSDesc: Process orders quickly, manage tables, and print receipts from a single modern POS interface.
LandingPage.featuresSubtitle: Highly scalable and fully integrated to optimize efficiency for large-scale restaurant management.
LandingPage.f1Desc: Direct order integration from customer tables without installing additional apps.
LandingPage.f2Desc: Instant synchronization of kitchen and cashier queues using cloud infrastructure.
LandingPage.f3Desc: Audit trail and validation of digital transaction receipts in a single click.
LandingPage.f4Desc: Comprehensive monitoring of sales trends, table turnover, and menu performance.
LandingPage.hwSubtitle: Seamless technological adaptation designed to be activated in just 3 concrete steps.
LandingPage.hw1Desc: Master account setup, menu digitization, and pricing configuration.
LandingPage.hw2Desc: Generation and printing of table identification points (QR) for customers.
LandingPage.hw3Desc: Automatic order reception and direct monitoring on the command center.
LandingPage.pricingSubtitle: Scalable design to meet the needs of mid-to-enterprise F&B businesses.
LandingPage.p1Desc: Standard infrastructure for cafes or restaurants with medium operational scale.
LandingPage.p2Desc: Limitless ecosystem for restaurant chains or high transaction volume management.
LandingPage.faqSubtitle: Knowledge base regarding QREats technical and operational capabilities.
LandingPage.faq1A: QREats acts as a Cloud POS SaaS connecting customer touchpoints (via QR) directly to the order management dashboard instantly without third-party hardware.
LandingPage.faq2A: The system operates 100% web-based (PWA). Customers are not required to download or install any applications, reducing transaction friction.
LandingPage.faq3A: Customers upload transfer receipts via the checkout page. The system signals the cashier dashboard for final validation with a single manual confirmation or rejection.
LandingPage.faq4A: Data is encrypted at the database level using a cloud environment compliant with industry standards to protect order confidentiality and access credentials.
LandingPage.ctaBottomSubtitle: Implement a modern and efficient order management ecosystem in minutes.
LandingPage.modalSubtitle: Explore the system functionalities directly through our trial scope.
